name: adux-monorepo
description: ADUX — Ant Design UX Assistant (pm-antd-prototype 升级版)
author: ADUX contributors

scripts.version:rc: changeset pre enter rc && changeset version
scripts.release:check: corepack pnpm verify:release-metadata && corepack pnpm -r run build && corepack pnpm -r run typecheck && corepack pnpm -r run test && corepack pnpm pack:smoke
scripts.release:check:postpublish: corepack pnpm smoke:npm-install && corepack pnpm smoke:vite-overlay
